# dependency-audit-stinger

Supply-chain security playbook for the `dependency-audit-worker-bee` Bee. Encodes the 2026-current scanner decision matrix (Dependabot, Renovate, Snyk, socket.dev), vulnerability triage workflow, SBOM generation pipeline (Syft + CycloneDX + Sigstore), lockfile discipline, and npm/PyPI provenance verification.

See `SKILL.md` for the full guide map and `guides/00-scanner-decision-matrix.md` as the entry point.

**Research Summary:** `research/research-summary.md` (generated by `scripture-historian` on 2026-05-20; normal depth, 6-month window)
